title: FLF: Port Knocking Sequence Drilldown
description: FreeLabFriday-inspired link analysis for port knocking: knocks on 7000, 8000, and 9000 followed by SSH on 22, with failed wrong-order attempts preserved for comparison.
query: ('Log Source' = 'SOC VCN Flow Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Network Firewall Logs') and ('Destination Port' = 7000 or 'Destination Port' = 8000 or 'Destination Port' = 9000 or 'Destination Port' = 22) | link span = 5minute 'Source IP', 'Destination IP' | eventstats max(Count) as PeakEvents, sum(Count) as Events, distinctcount('Source IP') as Sources, distinctcount('Destination IP') as Targets

visualizationOptions.tileLayoutXml: <title-text>Peak Path</title-text><title-text>Events</title-text><title-text>Sources</title-text><title-text>Targets</title-text>

ask_ai_prompts: Which source completed the 7000 to 8000 to 9000 knock sequence and then reached SSH?
Compare the successful sequence with failed wrong-order attempts and identify the protected server.

references.name: Black Hills InfoSec FreeLabFriday Labs - Port Knocking on the Wire
